metadata.name: Video Games (MKW, Minecraft, BSs)
metadata.description: 120 questions about Mario Kart World (Nintendo Switch 2), Minecraft, and Brawl Stars — covering characters, maps, mechanics, lore, history, and competitive play.
metadata.author: Trivial World Team

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what is the name of the fiery underworld dimension you can travel to by building a special portal?
questions.tidbits: The Nether was originally called 'The Slip' during early development. Its unique netherrack block burns forever once lit.

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart World, what element allows drivers to travel underwater on certain track sections?
In Minecraft, what rare biome is covered entirely in giant mushrooms instead of trees?
In Brawl Stars, which environment type is associated with the Gem Grab map 'Hard Rock Mine'?
questions.tidbits: Hard Rock Mine is one of Brawl Stars' original maps and remains a competitive staple for Gem Grab tournaments.

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, which dimension contains the final boss of the game?
questions.tidbits: The End's central island is surrounded by an infinite void, and chorus fruit grows on the outer islands.

questions.questionText: Mario Kart World features open-world exploration between races. What is the large interconnected area between races called?
In Minecraft, what is the name of the deep underground biome introduced in the Caves & Cliffs update that is home to the Warden?
questions.tidbits: The Deep Dark generates below Y=0 and features ancient cities — the only place you can find the Swift Sneak enchantment.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, what is the sandy, cactus-filled desert environment featured on several maps called in the game's art style?
In Minecraft Java Edition, what specific Y-level was chosen as the new bedrock floor when the world depth was expanded in the Caves & Cliffs Part 2 update?
questions.tidbits: The 1.18 update doubled the effective building height, expanding the world from Y=0–255 to Y=-64–320.

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what cold biome features spruce trees, wolves, and frequent snowfall?
Which Mario Kart World cup features courses set in locations inspired by real-world tropical islands?
questions.answerText: Banana Cup (accept any tropical/island cup name)
questions.tidbits: Mario Kart World introduced new world-travel-themed cups alongside the classic Mushroom, Flower, Star, and Special cups.

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, which biome is required to spawn a Blue Orchid flower naturally?
In Brawl Stars, the Brawl Ball map 'Backyard Bowl' is set in what kind of environment?
In Minecraft, what dimension can you only reach by defeating the Ender Dragon and then exploring far from the central island?
questions.tidbits: End Cities with their loot chests and Elytra wings only spawn on the outer End islands, reachable via the End gateway.

questions.questionText: Mario Kart World includes a classic returning track set in a haunted mansion. What is the name of the iconic ghost-house course first introduced in Super Nintendo's Mario Kart?
questions.answerText: Ghost Valley (or Koopa Troopa Beach / Ghost House track)
questions.tidbits: The original SNES had Ghost Valley 1, 2, and 3. Haunted tracks have been a staple of every Mario Kart game since.

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what type of biome generates the tallest trees in the game — trees so large they have their own canopy layer?
In Brawl Stars, the map environment used in Hot Zone mode often features which kind of terrain element that restricts movement?
In Minecraft, what is the name of the biome variant featuring dark-colored oak trees, podzol ground, and giant mushrooms all together?
In Mario Kart World, what new movement ability lets karts stick to and drive along certain vertical surfaces on track walls?
In Minecraft, what is the name of the frozen biome variant that features icebergs and blue ice on the ocean surface?
questions.tidbits: Blue ice, found in frozen ocean icebergs, is one of the fastest surfaces in Minecraft — boats on blue ice move extremely quickly.

questions.questionText: What viral phrase, taken from a famous Minecraft parody song, became one of the most recognizable memes in gaming history?
questions.tidbits: The meme originates from the 2012 song 'Revenge' by CaptainSparklez. It saw a massive second wave of popularity in the late 2010s.

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart, what notorious item is infamous for destroying a first-place racer's lead, spawning countless memes and rage reactions?
questions.tidbits: The Blue Shell was introduced in Mario Kart 64 in 1996. It can be blocked only by a Super Horn, which itself was added in Mario Kart 8 specifically as a counter.

questions.questionText: Which YouTube/streaming personality is most famous for popularizing Minecraft on their channel with 'Let's Play' series starting around 2010–2012?
questions.tidbits: PewDiePie's Minecraft series helped make him the most-subscribed individual YouTuber for years, and his 2019 return to Minecraft reignited a global interest in the game.

questions.questionText: What popular Brawl Stars content creator is known for in-depth tier lists, guides, and being one of the game's most prominent YouTube voices?
Minecraft has a beloved enemy mob whose creeping approach and explosion sound made it internet-famous. What is this mob called?
A massive Minecraft event pits streamers and YouTubers against each other in skill-based minigame competitions. What is this event called?
questions.tidbits: MCC was created by Noxcrew and Scott Smajor (Smajor1995). Events typically feature 10 teams of 4 competing in up to 9 minigames.

questions.questionText: Which streamer popularized 'Dream SMP,' the Minecraft private server that spawned a massive narrative-driven content universe?
In 2020, a prominent Minecraft speedrunner was accused of manipulating their random seed drops. Who was the center of that controversy?
questions.tidbits: A team of independent statisticians calculated that the probability of Dream's pearl and blaze drop rates occurring legitimately was roughly 1 in 7.5 trillion.

questions.questionText: Which global gaming company publishes Brawl Stars and is also known for Clash of Clans and Clash Royale?
Mario Kart World was released alongside which new Nintendo gaming console?
What was the name of the Brawl Stars World Championship 2023 grand finals winning team?
In Brawl Stars, what seasonal pass lets players earn exclusive skins, pins, and brawlers by playing the game and completing quests?
Which famous Mario Kart track — originally from the SNES — is so beloved it has returned in nearly every Mario Kart game and is nicknamed 'Rainbow Road'?
What viral trend involved Minecraft players building massive pixel-art portraits, flags, or logos using colored blocks when viewed from above?
questions.tidbits: YouTube creators like Mumbo Jumbo and Grian helped popularize large-scale pixel art builds, which require careful color-block mapping from a bird's-eye view.

questions.questionText: Which Mario Kart World Nintendo Direct showcase announced the new open-world feature for the first time to the public?
questions.answerText: Nintendo Direct (Nintendo Switch 2 reveal / Mario Kart World Direct 2025)
questions.tidbits: The reveal of Mario Kart World alongside the Nintendo Switch 2 was one of the most-watched Nintendo Directs in company history.

questions.questionText: Which Brawl Stars Brawler became an instant internet meme due to their cartoonishly over-the-top design and became a staple in fan art?
The Minecraft mob vote allows the community to vote for a new mob to be added to the game. At what annual event does this vote traditionally take place?
What Brawl Stars event challenges players to play as a squad of pre-selected brawlers and earn rewards based on win streaks?
questions.answerText: Club Wars (or Trophy Road push events)

questions.questionText: Which YouTuber produced the iconic Minecraft parody 'Don't Mine at Night' (a parody of Katy Perry's 'Last Friday Night')?
In Mario Kart, players in last place receive the most powerful items. What mechanic determines which items you receive based on your position?
questions.answerText: Item randomization / item boxes (rubber-band item system)

questions.questionText: Who originally created Minecraft and is credited as its designer?
In what year was the very first Mario Kart game released in Japan on the Super Nintendo?
questions.tidbits: Super Mario Kart launched August 27, 1992 in Japan. It was the first racing game to use Mode 7 graphics to simulate a 3D perspective.

questions.questionText: What company acquired Mojang — the developer of Minecraft — in 2014?
questions.tidbits: Microsoft purchased Mojang for approximately $2.5 billion, one of the largest gaming acquisitions at the time.

questions.questionText: In what year was Brawl Stars officially released worldwide after its soft launch in certain regions?
questions.tidbits: Brawl Stars soft-launched in Canada in June 2017 before its global release on December 12, 2018.

questions.questionText: Minecraft went through a famous early-access period before its official 'full release' in November of what year?
questions.tidbits: Minecraft 1.0.0 officially launched on November 18, 2011 at MINECON in Las Vegas. Earlier alpha and beta stages had attracted millions of players already.

questions.questionText: How many mainline Mario Kart games existed before Mario Kart World was released on Nintendo Switch 2?
questions.tidbits: The series spans: Super Mario Kart (SNES), Mario Kart 64, Super Circuit (GBA), Double Dash!! (GCN), DS, Wii, 7 (3DS), 8 (Wii U), and 8 Deluxe (Switch).

questions.questionText: In what city was Supercell (the developer of Brawl Stars) founded?
questions.tidbits: Supercell was founded in 2010 and remains headquartered in Helsinki. Softbank and Tencent are among its major investors.

questions.questionText: The 'Nether Update' was a major Minecraft overhaul of the Nether dimension. In which year was it released?
questions.tidbits: The Nether Update (Java 1.16) added new biomes like the Crimson Forest and Soul Sand Valley, along with Piglins and Hoglins.

questions.questionText: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe was one of the best-selling games on Nintendo Switch. What gaming platform did the original Mario Kart 8 (not Deluxe) launch on?
What was the name of the first public alpha version release of Minecraft that Notch made available for purchase in 2009?
questions.answerText: Classic (or Minecraft Classic / Survival Test / Alpha v1.0.0)
questions.tidbits: Notch released a free 'Classic' version in 2009 playable in a browser, with paid 'Survival Test' builds shortly after. The alpha formally began May 2009.

questions.questionText: Brawl Stars reached 100 million downloads in its first month after global launch. What mobile operating systems was it initially available on?
Which Mario Kart game was the first to introduce online multiplayer for the series?
questions.tidbits: Mario Kart DS (2005) used Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection, the company's first online service. It was a landmark moment in handheld online gaming.

questions.questionText: Minecraft's 'Caves & Cliffs' update was notable for being split into two separate releases. Part 1 released in 2021 — when did Part 2 release?
What was Minecraft originally inspired by? Name the voxel-based game that influenced Notch's initial prototype.
Brawl Stars had a major visual and meta overhaul in 2020 dubbed 'Brawl Stars' biggest update.' What was the name of this content mega-drop?
questions.answerText: Brawlidays / Season 1 (or the introduction of Brawl Pass)
questions.tidbits: The December 2020 season pass update fundamentally changed Brawl Stars progression, replacing most gem-based systems with a battle-pass model.

questions.questionText: Which Mario Kart game introduced antigravity driving, letting players drive on upside-down and vertical track sections?
questions.tidbits: Mario Kart 8's anti-gravity zones debuted in 2014 on Wii U. The mechanic returned in Mario Kart 8 Deluxe and was expanded in Mario Kart World.

questions.questionText: Minecraft is now the best-selling video game of all time. Approximately how many copies has it sold as of the mid-2020s?
What update introduced the Ender Dragon fight to Minecraft, giving players a true final boss for the first time?
In what year did Supercell cancel its game 'Brawl Stars' predecessor project codenamed 'Smash Land'?
questions.tidbits: Supercell famously 'kills' projects that don't meet their internal standards before launch, and Smash Land was one such casualty before Brawl Stars emerged.

questions.questionText: Which Nintendo console was the very first to feature Mario Kart as a launch title alongside the system itself?
questions.answerText: None (no Mario Kart game was a launch title — accept 'none')
questions.tidbits: Mario Kart has never been a literal day-one launch title, though Mario Kart World launched very close to Nintendo Switch 2's release window.

questions.questionText: Minecraft is famous for its distinctive art style. What term describes the cubic, blocky visual style all objects and characters use?
In Brawl Stars, what art style describes the colorful, cartoon-like visuals featuring exaggerated proportions and bright colors?
Minecraft's default character skin is named Steve. What is the name of the female counterpart default skin?
questions.tidbits: Alex was introduced in Java Edition 1.8 (2014). She has a slimmer arm model than Steve — distinguishable by the 3-pixel-wide arms versus Steve's 4-pixel arms.

questions.questionText: Mario Kart World features which iconic Nintendo princess as a playable character known for her blonde hair and pink dress?
In Brawl Stars, what rarity tier sits above Legendary rarity — introduced as an even higher tier for exclusive and special brawlers?
questions.answerText: Hypercharge (or Hyper Rare / the Hypercharge tier)
questions.tidbits: Hypercharges were added as a new power tier in 2023, giving existing Legendary brawlers an enhanced charged-up super ability.

questions.questionText: What is the name of the large green dinosaur who serves as a mount for Mario and is a recurring character in Mario Kart games?
In Minecraft, what is the default texture resolution (in pixels) for each block face in the standard Java Edition texture pack?
questions.tidbits: Each block face uses a 16×16 pixel texture. Resource packs can increase this to 32×32, 64×64, 128×128, or even 512×512 for HD texture packs.

questions.questionText: Brawl Stars features animated shorts called 'Brawl-o-Vision' or story animations. What format are these character stories typically released in?
Mario Kart World introduced new 'world' aesthetics for its tracks. What is the visual theme of the game's title card and main menu branding?
questions.answerText: Globe / world map / travel poster style

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what large, dark, four-armed creature teleports around and becomes hostile when you look directly into its eyes?
Brawl Stars brawler 'Crow' is legendary rarity. What distinctive visual element makes Crow recognizable — describe his silhouette feature.
questions.answerText: His dark feather/wing cape and poison-dagger weapons (sharp feathers)
questions.tidbits: Crow was one of the original Legendary brawlers at launch. His slim design and feathered aesthetic set him apart visually from tankier brawlers.

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what is the signature color scheme of the Creeper mob's skin?
Mario Kart World features a new roster. Which beloved Nintendo princess — known for her teal dress, long red hair, and star-themed powers — appears as a playable racer?
Minecraft's 'End' dimension features a unique block called End Stone and End Cities with Shulker enemies. What color are the Shulker boxes they drop?
questions.answerText: Purple (default undyed shulker box is purple)

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, what is the color associated with the most basic and common brawler rarity level?
Which Mario Kart playable character is a golden-colored baby version of the Donkey Kong villain who drives tiny karts?
In Minecraft, what color wool must you use to craft a bed that lets Steve or Alex sleep through the night?
questions.tidbits: Beds can be crafted from any of the 16 wool colors. The resulting bed color matches the wool used, making them a great decoration block too.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, which original launch Thrower brawler lobs bundles of dynamite in an arc and has skins styled to look like he's throwing popcorn?
questions.tidbits: Dynamike was one of the original launch brawlers and uses bundles of dynamite (styled as popcorn in some skins) thrown in an arc.

questions.questionText: Mario Kart World features kart customization. What term describes the aerodynamic wing attachments that affect gliding performance?

In Minecraft, players create large artistic builds visible from above. What is it called when players build a massive landscape recreation so detailed it represents an entire city, country, or famous location?
questions.answerText: Scale build / world build / terraforming project

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what resource is used to power circuits, doors, pistons, and automated machines in the game?
In Mario Kart World, how many racers compete in a standard Grand Prix race?
questions.tidbits: Mario Kart World expanded the field to 24 racers per race, up from the 12 in Mario Kart 8 Deluxe, making for far more chaotic races.

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what is the exact crafting recipe for a diamond sword (describe the grid layout)?
questions.answerText: 2 diamonds stacked vertically + 1 stick below in the center column
questions.tidbits: All swords follow the same 3-cell column pattern: 2 material blocks on top, 1 stick at the bottom. The material determines the sword's durability and damage.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, how many trophies must a player earn on a single brawler before that brawler's progression resets at the Trophy Road reset?
questions.tidbits: Brawl Stars resets trophies above 500 per brawler at the end of each season, awarding Star Points as compensation for the reset.

questions.questionText: In Minecraft Java Edition, what is the maximum signal strength a Redstone signal can carry before it needs a Repeater to boost it?
questions.tidbits: Each block a redstone wire travels reduces signal strength by 1. At 0 it stops entirely, so a repeater must be placed every 15 blocks to sustain a signal.

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart World, what mechanic rewards players who perform a well-timed drift with a speed boost?
questions.tidbits: Drift boosts have three levels in Mario Kart 8 Deluxe and World: blue sparks, orange sparks, and purple/ultra sparks — each progressively faster.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, what happens to a player's gems when they are eliminated in Gem Grab mode?
questions.answerText: They drop all their gems on the ground for other players to collect

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, how many planks does a single log of wood produce when placed in the crafting grid?
In Minecraft, what specific combination of materials is needed to craft TNT?
questions.tidbits: TNT in Minecraft has an explosion power of 4, the same as a creeper. An activated TNT block has a 4-second fuse before detonating.

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart World, how many Grand Prix cups are available at launch?
questions.tidbits: Mario Kart World launched with more courses than any previous entry, leveraging the open world to connect tracks across a single seamless map.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, what is the name of the game mode where teams push an unlocked safe toward the enemy base?
In Minecraft, what tool is most efficient for mining stone and ores?
In Brawl Stars, what is the base health of the starting brawler Shelly at Power Level 1?
questions.answerText: 2800 HP (approximately — accept 2600–3000 range given balance patches)

questions.questionText: In Minecraft, what structure must you locate and activate using Eyes of Ender to reach the End dimension?
questions.answerText: Stronghold (specifically the End Portal inside it)

questions.questionText: Mario Kart World uses real-time item physics — what happens when you drive over the spinning item box on the track?
In Minecraft, what is the tick rate of a standard Minecraft server, and how many ticks occur per second?
questions.tidbits: Each game tick is 50ms. Redstone also runs on tick intervals — a single redstone tick equals 2 game ticks (100ms), explaining why redstone clocks are measured differently.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, how many players are on each team in the standard 3v3 game modes?
In Mario Kart World, what item allows a racer to accelerate forward at high speed, knocking out competitors in their path?
In Minecraft, what is the maximum enchantment level for the Fortune enchantment, and what does Fortune III do to diamond ore drops?
questions.answerText: Fortune III (max level 3); it gives up to a 4x chance of additional diamond drops per ore
questions.tidbits: With Fortune III, a single diamond ore can drop up to 4 diamonds instead of 1, making it the most valuable enchantment for resource farming.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, what is the name of the game mode where players collect stars by eliminating opponents who each carry a bounty?
What is the term for completing a Minecraft speedrun by defeating the Ender Dragon as fast as possible from a fresh world?
In Mario Kart competitive play, what is the abbreviation for the time-attack solo mode where players race against their own best lap times?
What website serves as the official leaderboard for Minecraft speedrunning records?
questions.tidbits: Speedrun.com hosts moderated leaderboards for thousands of games. Minecraft Any% is consistently one of the most-contested categories on the site.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars esports, what is the annual championship event where top regional teams compete for a world title?
Minecraft Championship (MCC) features many minigames. What is the fan-favorite 'survival games'-style minigame where players fight to be the last team standing?
questions.answerText: Battle Box (or Sky Battle / Survival Games variant)
questions.tidbits: Battle Box is a fan-favorite MCC event where teams battle in a box arena. Sky Battle, introduced in MCC 20, pits teams on floating islands.

questions.questionText: What is the world record approximate time for a Minecraft Java Edition Random Seed Any% speedrun (as of 2025)?
questions.tidbits: Top Minecraft speedrunners use blind travel, specific trade setups, and RNG manipulation techniques. Records continue to fall as the community optimizes routes.

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart competitive play, what is the name of the online ranked mode where players earn points against global opponents?
questions.answerText: Online / VS Race / Grand Prix (online ranked mode)

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, what ladder system is used to track a player's overall skill and progress across all brawlers?
In Minecraft speedrunning, what RNG-dependent trade allows players to skip searching for a Nether Fortress by getting Blaze Rods from Piglins?
questions.answerText: Piglin bartering / gold bartering (trading gold ingots for Ender Pearls, then killing Blazes for rods)
questions.tidbits: The 'bastionless' route uses Piglin bartering for ender pearls and finds a small Nether Fortress just for Blaze Rods, saving minutes over a full fortress clear.

questions.questionText: Mario Kart World's online mode features bracket-style tournaments. What is the maximum number of players who can compete in a single online race?
In Brawl Stars competitive play, what is the Brawl Stars Championship qualifier format called where top players within a region earn spots to regional finals?
questions.answerText: Monthly Finals (Championship Monthly Challenge / Regional qualifiers)

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars ranked play, what is the highest rank tier a player can achieve?
questions.answerText: Masters (or Diamond/Elite — accept the highest named rank)

questions.questionText: What Minecraft Championship event first reached over 1 million concurrent viewers on Twitch, marking a milestone for the competitive community?
questions.answerText: MCC (exact event number varies — accept 'Minecraft Championship / MCC Pride event or MCC All Stars')

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart, what technique do competitive players use where they intentionally shake their controller or rapidly alternate direction to charge drift boosts faster?
Which country has historically dominated Brawl Stars World Championship finals in the 2020s?
In Minecraft speedrunning, what is the term for the 'no major glitches' category that allows standard gameplay optimizations but bans sequence-breaking exploits?
questions.answerText: NMG (No Major Glitches) or simply 'Any% NMG'
questions.tidbits: The NMG category prohibits things like duplication glitches and out-of-bounds exploits, but allows legitimate tricks like trading routes and end-to-portal routing.

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart World's Grand Prix, what score is needed to earn first place in a four-race cup?
questions.answerText: Most points / 1st place overall (60 points max across 4 races)
questions.tidbits: In Mario Kart 8 Deluxe and World, each race awards up to 15 points for 1st, down to 1 point for 12th. A perfect cup score would be 60 points.

questions.questionText: In Brawl Stars, what metric determines seeding at the World Championship — total club trophies, individual player rank, or championship challenge wins?
questions.answerText: Championship Challenge wins (qualifying through Championship Challenge format)

questions.questionText: Minecraft speedrunning has a famous 'set seed' category alongside random seed. What advantage does a set seed run provide the runner?
questions.answerText: The world layout is predetermined / known in advance, allowing memorized routes

questions.questionText: In Mario Kart World, what is the name of the coveted item that, when used, destroys all nearby racers and items around the holder?
questions.answerText: Super Star (Invincibility Star) / or the Lightning item
questions.tidbits: The Super Star grants temporary invincibility and a speed boost, while Lightning shrinks all opponents simultaneously — both are powerful in race endings.
